creator: laskavy@cs.msu.su
text:
In the default /etc/rc.conf file the "accounting" option
must be changed to "accounting_enable".

Fix: 

Thanks, Sergei S. Laskavy--ploVSuyWPuPVBSKOK95jJIcO3jpmkrzqCQyyGafj2qm6uXup
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

*** rc.conf.orig	Mon Jun 30 23:53:18 1997
--- rc.conf	Mon Jun 30 23:54:06 1997
***************
*** 119,125 ****
  savecore_enable="NO"	# Save kernel crashdumps for debugging (or NO).
  dumpdev="NO"		# Device name to crashdump to (if enabled).
  check_quotas="NO"	# Check quotas (or NO).
! accounting="NO"		# Turn on process accounting (or NO).
  ibcs2_enable="NO"	# Ibcs2 (SCO) emulation loaded at startup (or NO).
  linux_enable="NO"	# Linux emulation loaded at startup (or NO).
  rand_irqs="NO"		# Stir the entropy pool (or NO).
--- 119,125 ----
  savecore_enable="NO"	# Save kernel crashdumps for debugging (or NO).
  dumpdev="NO"		# Device name to crashdump to (if enabled).
  check_quotas="NO"	# Check quotas (or NO).
! accounting_enable="NO"	# Turn on process accounting (or NO).
  ibcs2_enable="NO"	# Ibcs2 (SCO) emulation loaded at startup (or NO).
  linux_enable="NO"	# Linux emulation loaded at startup (or NO).
  rand_irqs="NO"		# Stir the entropy pool (or NO).
How-To-Repeat: 
Try to turn accounting on.
